container-narrow.$description: Max width for long-form reading columns (legal/policy pages).

control-sm.$description: Small square/circular control box — step badges, compact icon targets. A control DIMENSION, not spacing: it sizes a box rather than the gap around one, so it lives on the size scale rather than the 4px space ramp.

control-md.$description: Medium square control box — icon buttons, carousel arrows. Meets the 40px minimum comfortable pointer target.

strong.$description: Input borders. INTENTIONALLY off the 4px grid: the 4px grid governs SPACING (gaps, insets, rhythm), not stroke weights. Hairline-class strokes are their own concern and legitimately land on sub-grid values — 1.5px is the deliberate mid-step between the 1px hairline and a 2px heavy rule. Not a defect; do not 'normalize' this to 1px or 2px.

focus.$description: Gap between a focus ring and the element it outlines. Pairs with border.width.focus so focus treatment is fully tokenized and stays consistent across every consumer (a11y-critical: focus affordances must not drift per-surface).
